requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — AS/NZS 62368-1 Compliance for Controlled Electrical Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——受控电气设备的AS/NZS 62368-1合规
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——受控電氣裝置的AS/NZS 62368-1合規

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices sold in New Zealand that qualify as controlled electrical devices (CEDs) under the Electrical Safety Regulations 2010 (ESR 2010) must comply with applicable AS/NZS safety standards. AS/NZS 62368-1 (Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment — Safety requirements) is the primary applicable standard for consumer Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices. Compliance must be established before the device is supplied to the New Zealand market. Evidence of compliance (test reports from an accredited laboratory) must support the Supplier Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) and be retained by the supplier. WorkSafe New Zealand administers enforcement under the Electricity Act 1992 and ESR 2010.
summary.zh: 在新西兰销售的符合《电气安全法规》2010年（ESR 2010）受控电气设备（CED）定义的无线和物联网设备，须符合适用AS/NZS安全标准。AS/NZS 62368-1（视听、信息技术及通信技术设备——安全要求）是消费类Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备的主要适用标准。设备供应新西兰市场前须确立合规性。合规证据（获认可实验室出具的测试报告）须支持供应商符合性声明（SDoC）并由供应商留存。WorkSafe新西兰依据《电力法》1992年和ESR 2010执行监管。
summary.zht: 在新西蘭銷售的符合《電氣安全法規》2010年（ESR 2010）受控電氣裝置（CED）定義的無線和物聯網裝置，須符合適用AS/NZS安全標準。AS/NZS 62368-1（視聽、資訊技術及通訊技術設備——安全要求）是消費類Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置的主要適用標準。裝置供應新西蘭市場前須確立合規性。合規證據（獲認可實驗室出具的測試報告）須支持供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）並由供應商留存。WorkSafe新西蘭依據《電力法》1992年和ESR 2010執行監管。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 62368-1:2018 — Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment: Safety requirements
AS/NZS 3112 — Plugs, socket-outlets and socket-outlet adaptors (plug compliance)

summary.en: In China, IT and audio/video equipment electrical safety is governed by GB 4943.1 (Information technology equipment — Safety) for applicable in-scope products, which requires CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA and carried out by CQC or other designated bodies. The Chinese standard GB 4943.1 is technically aligned with IEC 60950-1; China is progressively transitioning to GB 4943.1-2022 aligned with IEC 62368-1.
summary.zh: 在中国，适用范围内IT和视听设备的电气安全受GB 4943.1（信息技术设备——安全）管辖，须取得CNCA管理、由CQC或其他指定机构实施的强制性产品认证（CCC）。中国标准GB 4943.1与IEC 60950-1技术协调；中国正逐步向与IEC 62368-1协调的GB 4943.1-2022过渡。
summary.zht: 在中國，適用範圍內IT和視聽設備的電氣安全受GB 4943.1（信息技術設備——安全）管轄，須取得CNCA管理、由CQC或其他指定機構實施的強制性產品認證（CCC）。中國標準GB 4943.1與IEC 60950-1技術協調；中國正逐步向與IEC 62368-1協調的GB 4943.1-2022過渡。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — IT equipment electrical safety (China mandatory for CCC-listed categories)
GB 4943.1-2022 — updated China edition aligned with IEC 62368-1 (transitional)

gap.en: CCC certification and GB 4943.1 test reports are not recognised in New Zealand. AS/NZS 62368-1 (or IEC 62368-1 with AS/NZS deviations noted) test reports from an IANZ- or JAS-ANZ-accredited laboratory are required to support the NZ SDoC. While IEC 62368-1 and AS/NZS 62368-1 are technically close, the supplier must issue a NZ-specific SDoC referencing AS/NZS 62368-1 and must ensure plug / mains voltage compliance is separately addressed.
gap.zh: CCC认证和GB 4943.1测试报告在新西兰不被认可。须使用经IANZ或JAS-ANZ认可实验室出具的AS/NZS 62368-1（或注明AS/NZS差异的IEC 62368-1）测试报告来支持新西兰SDoC。尽管IEC 62368-1与AS/NZS 62368-1技术上接近，供应商须出具引用AS/NZS 62368-1的新西兰专用SDoC，并须另行确保插头/市电电压合规。
gap.zht: CCC認證和GB 4943.1測試報告在新西蘭不被認可。須使用經IANZ或JAS-ANZ認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS 62368-1（或注明AS/NZS差異的IEC 62368-1）測試報告來支持新西蘭SDoC。儘管IEC 62368-1與AS/NZS 62368-1技術上接近，供應商須出具引用AS/NZS 62368-1的新西蘭專用SDoC，並須另行確保插頭/市電電壓合規。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AS/NZS 62368-1 compliance is mandatory for in-scope consumer wireless/IoT devices sold in New Zealand as controlled electrical devices; CCC certification and GB 4943.1 reports are not accepted; an NZ-specific Supplier Declaration of Conformity referencing AS/NZS 62368-1 is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] AS/NZS 62368-1合规对作为受控电气设备在新西兰销售的适用范围内消费类无线/物联网设备为强制性要求；CCC认证和GB 4943.1报告不被接受；须出具引用AS/NZS 62368-1的新西兰专用供应商符合性声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] AS/NZS 62368-1合規對作為受控電氣裝置在新西蘭銷售的適用範圍內消費類無線/物聯網裝置為強制性要求；CCC認證和GB 4943.1報告不被接受；須出具引用AS/NZS 62368-1的新西蘭專用供應商符合性聲明。
